name: Lily Beach Resort & Spa
highlights: Sold on the all-inclusive 'Platinum Plan' covering meals, premium wines, Taittinger champagne by the glass and a daily-restocked minibar
Platinum Plan also includes non-motorised watersports, snorkelling equipment and complimentary excursions
Turtle Kids' Club and sports complex on site; direct house-reef access on Huvahendhoo island in South Ari Atoll

name: Niva Kuramathi Maldives
highlights: Offers two bookable all-inclusive plans, including a 'Dine Around' upgrade covering a la carte dinners across the island's specialty restaurants
1.8 km-long natural island with a large natural sandbank at its tip; 12 restaurants and multiple bars
Dive centre with 20+ Rasdhoo Atoll dive sites reachable in 5-45 minutes; kids' club and spa on site

name: Centara Ras Fushi Resort & Spa Maldives
highlights: Adults-only (18+) island offering all-inclusive and 'Gold All Inclusive' meal plans covering meals plus drinks at the bars
Roughly 20 minutes by speedboat from Velana International Airport in North Male Atoll
Snorkelling and watersports centre plus Spa Cenvaree treatments; around 140 beach and over-water villas

name: Sun Siyam Iru Fushi
highlights: Premium all-inclusive 'dine around' plan spanning the resort's restaurants and bars, including 24-hour service
Private island in Noonu Atoll, about a 45-minute seaplane flight from Male
221 villas and suites; spa with an extensive treatment menu by Thalgo France

name: Siyam World Maldives
highlights: 24-hour premium all-inclusive plan with no closing times on food and drinks across 12+ restaurants and bars
54-hectare island with a floating water park and water villas with slides into the lagoon
All-inclusive plan bundles airport transfers and resort-wide Wi-Fi

name: Club Med Phuket
highlights: All-inclusive rate covers meals, drinks and around 30 included activities such as archery, trapeze, tennis and yoga
Kids' Clubs for ages 0-10 and Teen Club for ages 11-17, plus the Lai Thai Family Oasis opened in April 2025
Longest resort beachfront on Kata Beach, with an adults-only pool alongside the main and kids' pools

name: Club Med Bali
highlights: All-inclusive rate covers meals, drinks, sports and evening entertainment across the resort
Beachfront in Nusa Dua on Bali's southern coast, with roughly 391 rooms, four pools, three bars and two restaurants
During renovation works from July 2026 to May 2027 the resort welcomes guests aged 12 and over only, with kids' clubs closed

name: Rixos Premium Seagate
destination: Nabq Bay, Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt
highlights: Ultra all-inclusive concept covering meals and drinks (including imported spirits) across roughly 20 restaurants and bars
Around 1,058 rooms, suites and villas with eight swimming pools on the Red Sea at Nabq Bay
Adjacent Rixos Aquaventure Park with 23 water slides, wave pool and lazy river; Anjana Spa on site

name: Rixos Premium Magawish Suites & Villas
highlights: Premium ultra all-inclusive resort of suites and villas, with a main buffet, seven a la carte restaurants and 14 bars
Private sandy Red Sea beach and around 30 swimming pools, including swim-up suites
About 7 km from Hurghada International Airport; Rixy Kids Club and Anjana Spa on site

name: Hotel Riu Palace Zanzibar
highlights: RIU 24-hour All Inclusive service covering buffet and themed restaurants, snacks and bar drinks
Beachfront at Nungwi on the northern tip of Zanzibar, with a dive centre and watersports
Converted from adults-only to a family hotel from 1 November 2025; Elite Club rooms add a private lounge and reserved beach section

name: Hotel Riu Palace Mauritius
highlights: Adults-only (18+) with RIU 24-hour All Inclusive covering meals and drinks across eight restaurants
White-sand beach at Le Morne with views of Le Morne Brabant mountain; 310 rooms and three pools
Included watersports such as snorkelling, kayaking and windsurfing, plus a Renova Spa

name: Club Med Seychelles
highlights: All-inclusive rate covers accommodation, meals, drinks, sports and entertainment, with around 39 included activities
Only resort on Sainte Anne Island inside Sainte Anne Marine National Park, about 4 km off Mahe
Included watersports include snorkelling, kayaking and paddleboarding; some accommodations have private pools

name: Rixos Bab Al Bahr
destination: Al Marjan Island, Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates
highlights: Ultra all-inclusive concept covering food and drinks across the resort's 14+ restaurants and bars
Beachfront on Al Marjan Island, roughly 70 km from Dubai International Airport
Rixy Kids Club, nightly live entertainment and the Misul Spa & Salon with separate men's and women's spas

name: Rixos The Palm Hotel & Suites
destination: Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
highlights: Ultra all-inclusive dine-around covering 11 food and beverage outlets and over 100 international beverage brands
Private beach on the eastern tip of Palm Jumeirah with views of the Dubai Marina skyline
316 rooms and suites, each with at least one sea-view balcony; Turkish-inspired Anjana Spa

name: Turtle Island Fiji
highlights: Genuinely all-inclusive: meals, wines, cocktails and activities are covered in the stay
Couples-only private island hosting a maximum of 14 couples in 14 bures, with 12 private beaches
Included activities span snorkelling, diving, fishing and horseback riding on the Blue Lagoon

name: Castaway Island, Fiji
highlights: Bookable all-inclusive meal package covering breakfast, lunch and dinner plus alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks at the resort's restaurants and bars
Private island in the Mamanuca group reached by launch transfer from Port Denarau
Complimentary kids' club for ages 3-12, snorkelling gear and non-motorised watersports included

name: OUTRIGGER Fiji Beach Resort
destination: Korotogo, Coral Coast, Viti Levu, Fiji
highlights: All-inclusive meal plan option covering meals plus a daily beverage package of beer, wine, select cocktails, spirits and soft drinks
Coral Coast beachfront on Viti Levu, drivable from Nadi International Airport
Family-focused: up to two children 12 and under stay and eat free at selected venues when dining with adults

name: The Brando
highlights: All-inclusive rate covers all meals plus beverages including water, soft drinks, beer, wine, champagne and premium spirits
35 private villas on the Tetiaroa atoll, about a 20-minute flight from Tahiti
All-inclusive plan includes two shared concierge-curated excursions per day per bedroom

name: Excellence Punta Cana
destination: Uvero Alto, Punta Cana, Dominican Republic
highlights: Adults-only, all-inclusive property on Uvero Alto beach with a winding river-style pool
Multiple a-la-carte restaurants with no reservations required
Excellence Club room tier adds a private lounge and upgraded amenities

name: Secrets Cap Cana Resort & Spa
destination: Cap Cana, Punta Cana, Dominican Republic
highlights: Adults-only Unlimited-Luxury all-inclusive on Juanillo Beach inside the gated Cap Cana community
457 suites including swim-out and bungalow suites, plus a Preferred Club tier
Ten dining venues including seven a-la-carte restaurants; part of World of Hyatt

name: Hyatt Ziva Cap Cana
destination: Cap Cana, Punta Cana, Dominican Republic
highlights: All-ages all-inclusive with 375 oceanfront suites on Juanillo Beach
On-site water park with lazy river and slides, plus infinity pools
Seven restaurants and seven bars included in the rate

name: Hard Rock Hotel & Casino Punta Cana
highlights: All-inclusive rate covers unlimited food and beverage, room service and nightly entertainment
13 pools and nine restaurants on a large beachfront campus
On-site casino with 435+ slot and video poker machines

name: Sandals Negril Beach Resort & Spa
highlights: Couples-only (18+) all-inclusive on the widest stretch of Seven Mile Beach
Eight restaurants and five bars included, plus a stocked in-room bar
Confirmed open and operating after Hurricane Melissa

name: Beaches Negril Resort & Spa
highlights: Family all-inclusive on Seven Mile Beach; rate covers food, premium drinks, water sports and round-trip transfers
Kids programming with Sesame Street characters and a teen club
One of the Sandals/Beaches Jamaica properties confirmed open post-Hurricane Melissa

name: Excellence Oyster Bay
highlights: Adults-only all-inclusive on a private peninsula about 30 minutes from Montego Bay airport
315 suites; 11 restaurants and 24-hour room service included
Reopened within roughly six weeks of Hurricane Melissa and is operating; beach bungalow expansion underway

name: Couples Swept Away
highlights: Adults-only, couples-focused all-inclusive with 312 suites on 19 acres of Seven Mile Beach
10-acre sports and fitness complex, among the largest in Jamaica
Reopened December 2025 after Hurricane Melissa

name: Sandals Royal Bahamian
highlights: Couples-only all-inclusive on Cable Beach with its own private offshore island
10 restaurants and eight bars included; PADI scuba diving included
About 10 minutes from Lynden Pindling International Airport

name: Warwick Paradise Island Bahamas
highlights: Adults-only (16+) all-inclusive on a 16-acre beachfront site on Paradise Island's south shore
250 rooms; five restaurants and two bars included
On-site spa, lagoon-style pool and separate lap pool

name: Riu Palace Antillas
highlights: Adults-only (18+) 24-hour all-inclusive with 482 rooms on Palm Beach
Buffet plus four specialty restaurants; on-site casino and nightclub
Connected by a bridge to sister property Riu Palace Aruba, whose facilities guests may use

name: Divi Aruba All Inclusive
highlights: All-inclusive rate includes full access to 12 dining venues shared with adjoining Tamarijn Aruba
Sits on roughly 1.5 miles of white-sand beach on Aruba's southwest coast
Guests have access to the Divi Links golf course facilities on property grounds

name: Sandals Grande St. Lucian
highlights: Couples-only all-inclusive on a narrow peninsula between Rodney Bay and the Atlantic
12 restaurants and seven bars included; over-the-water bungalows on property
'Stay at 1, Play at 3' access to the two other Sandals resorts in Saint Lucia; green fees at Cap Estate golf course included

name: Coconut Bay Beach Resort & Spa
highlights: Independently owned premium all-inclusive on 85 acres, about five minutes from Hewanorra International Airport
Split into a family 'Splash' side with a large waterpark and an adults-only 'Harmony' wing
Nine restaurants, seven bars and five pools included

name: BodyHoliday Saint Lucia
destination: Cap Estate, Gros Islet, Saint Lucia
highlights: All-inclusive wellness resort whose rate includes a daily one-hour spa treatment plus yoga, Tai Chi and meditation
155 rooms and suites on Cariblue Beach with six restaurants and three pools
16+ adults-only for most of the year; children 12+ are admitted during Christmas, Easter and summer family periods

name: Beaches Turks & Caicos
highlights: Family all-inclusive on Grace Bay with five themed villages and 10 pools
45,000-square-foot on-site waterpark
About 20 specialty restaurants with all meals and premium drinks included

name: Club Med Turkoise
highlights: Adults-only (18+) all-inclusive on Grace Bay; the only adults-only resort on the island
Rate includes meals, drinks, non-motorized water sports and 27 activities including sailing, trapeze and pickleball
About 15 minutes from Providenciales International Airport

name: Sandals Royal Barbados
destination: St. Lawrence Gap, Christ Church, Barbados
highlights: Couples-only all-inclusive; guests get access to 21 restaurants and 14 bars across it and adjacent Sandals Barbados
Rooftop infinity pool with panoramic ocean views
Four-lane bowling alley and craft beer bar on property

name: O2 Beach Club & Spa
destination: St. Lawrence Gap, Christ Church, Barbados
highlights: All-inclusive suite resort (about 130 suites) on a 1,000-foot beach on the south coast
Three pools including an adults-only river pool and sun terrace
Acqua Spa on site; rate includes dining, non-motorized water sports and daily activities

name: Sandals Grande Antigua
highlights: Couples-only all-inclusive on Dickenson Bay, the island's longest beach
11-12 specialty restaurants with unlimited dining and premium liquors included
Complimentary PADI scuba diving and snorkeling trips

name: Hammock Cove Antigua
highlights: Adults-only all-inclusive of 41 freestanding villas, each with a private plunge pool
Dedicated 'vacation concierge' assigned to each villa
Three-tiered infinity pool and the Tranquility Body & Soul Spa; dining and wine included

name: Sandals Royal Curaçao
highlights: Couples-only all-inclusive opened in 2022; unlimited dining across its restaurants plus included scuba diving
Seaside butler bungalows with private infinity pools
'Island Inclusive' program gives butler-level guests on longer stays a dine-out credit and use of a MINI Cooper

name: Dreams Curaçao Resort, Spa & Casino
highlights: All-ages Unlimited-Luxury all-inclusive on Piscadera Bay with three pools
On-site casino and spa; part of World of Hyatt
Sip, Savor & See exchange privileges with the nearby sister Sunscape property

name: Sandals Grenada Resort & Spa
destination: Pink Gin Beach, St. George's, Grenada
highlights: Couples-only all-inclusive on Pink Gin Beach with 10 specialty restaurants included
Skypool Suites with private balcony infinity pools and standalone Rondoval cottages
Five minutes from Maurice Bishop International Airport; transfers included

name: Spice Island Beach Resort
destination: Grand Anse Beach, St. George's, Grenada
highlights: AAA Five Diamond all-inclusive with 64 suites on Grand Anse Beach; 34 suites are directly beachfront
Rate covers all buffet and a-la-carte meals, beverages, and all on-site activities and facilities
Independently owned and operated by the Hopkin family across an eight-acre site

name: Ikos Olivia
highlights: Set on roughly 450m of Blue Flag sandy beach on the Sithonia side of the Halkidiki peninsula, in about 22 acres of landscaped gardens
Six dining venues with menus curated by Michelin-starred chefs, plus the Ikos 'Dine Out' programme at partner restaurants off-resort at no extra charge
Four pools including a lagoon pool with swim-up bar; kayaking, tennis and yoga included in the stay

name: Ikos Porto Petro
highlights: Opened June 2023 on Mallorca's southeast coast beside Mondrago Natural Park, a short walk from Porto Petro marina
319 rooms and suites, five outdoor pools and access to sandy coves
Five a la carte restaurants with Michelin-starred chef-designed menus and over 100 wines included

name: Grecotel LUXME White Palace
highlights: Runs Grecotel's LUX ME all-inclusive concept: dining across seven restaurants plus unlimited drinks including premium brands, wines and cocktails
Fronts a roughly 1,000m sand-and-pebble beach on Crete's north coast near Rethymnon
22 pools on property, plus Grecoland kids club and an on-site spa

name: Mitsis Selection Alila
highlights: Ultra all-inclusive 5-star beach resort directly on a Blue Flag beach in Faliraki, Rhodes
313 guest rooms, with dining spread across a main restaurant plus additional restaurants and grab-and-go spots and six bars
Daytime entertainment programme with sports and recreational activities included

name: Rixos Premium Belek
highlights: All-inclusive concept covering restaurants, bars and entertainment venues across a 400,000+ sqm seafront estate in the pine forests of Belek
Stay includes unlimited access to The Land of Legends theme park nearby
Dining includes the Turquoise buffet with sushi station plus a la carte Italian, Turkish, seafood and steak venues; Anjana spa on site
About 40km from Antalya International Airport

name: Rixos Premium Bodrum
highlights: All-inclusive concept combining restaurants, bars and entertainment venues on the Bodrum peninsula between the Aegean and the national parks
Extensive wellness and sports facilities on site
Part of Accor's All Inclusive Collection portfolio of Rixos resorts in Turkey

name: Iberostar Selection Fuerteventura Palace
destination: Jandia (Morro Jable), Fuerteventura, Canary Islands, Spain
highlights: All-inclusive board covers breakfast, lunch, dinner and snacks plus soft drinks, beer, wine and local-brand spirits
437 rooms fully renovated in a recent refurbishment; located on Jandia beach in southern Fuerteventura
Four pools, gym, Spa Sensations, three restaurants (including teppanyaki) and three bars; optional Star Prestige adults area with its own pool

name: Pestana Porto Santo All Inclusive
highlights: All-inclusive rate covers breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks and national and international drinks
328 rooms facing Porto Santo's 9km golden-sand beach, set in about 30,000 sqm of gardens
Four restaurants and three bars, plus a spa area with heated pool, sauna, Turkish bath and hammam; 18-hole golf course about 5 minutes away

name: Dreams Las Mareas Costa Rica
destination: Playa El Jobo, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
highlights: Unlimited-Luxury all-inclusive: gourmet dining, top-shelf spirits, 24-hour room service and day/night activities included with no wristbands or reservations
447 suites, each with a private balcony or terrace, on the beach at Playa El Jobo
Seven restaurants on site; about 1 hour 15 minutes from Liberia (LIR) international airport

name: The Westin Reserva Conchal, an All-Inclusive Golf Resort & Spa
highlights: All-inclusive package includes dining, 24-hour room service and a stocked in-room minibar
406 rooms, each with balcony or terrace, within a 2,400-acre reserve beside Playa Conchal
On-site championship golf course, tennis courts, lagoon-style pool and full-service spa; Marriott Bonvoy participating property

name: Planet Hollywood Costa Rica, An Autograph Collection All-Inclusive Resort
brand: Planet Hollywood by Royalton (Marriott Autograph Collection)
highlights: Nightly rate includes meals, snacks, alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks, entertainment, non-motorized water sports, kids' activities, taxes and gratuities
Located at the base of the Gulf of Papagayo, about 30 minutes from Liberia (LIR) international airport
Movie-themed entertainment programming and dedicated family and kids' facilities

name: Secrets Papagayo Costa Rica
highlights: Adults-only (18+) with Unlimited-Luxury all-inclusive: unlimited top-shelf spirits, no reservations needed at restaurants, 24-hour room service and daily refreshed mini-bar
202 suites, each with private balcony or terrace, on Playa Arenilla
Two pools (main pool with swim-up bar plus a relaxation pool) and a full-service spa; about 20 minutes from Liberia (LIR) airport

name: Coco Plum Island Resort
highlights: Adults-only all-inclusive private-island resort: packages cover three meals daily, unlimited local bar drinks, domestic flights from Belize International plus boat transfers, and scheduled guided snorkeling tours
16-acre private cay with 20 beachfront cabanas and an over-water villa, hosting a maximum of about 44 guests
Complimentary use of kayaks, paddleboards and Hobie Cats

name: Dreams Playa Bonita Panama
highlights: Unlimited-Luxury all-inclusive: no wristbands, no reservations at the eight dining venues, international top-shelf spirits included
301 ocean-view rooms and suites across seaside towers on Playa Bonita, with views toward the Panama Canal approach
About 20 minutes from Panama City and 30 minutes from the Panama Canal; Explorer's Club kids club for ages 3-12

name: Le Blanc Spa Resort Cancun
highlights: Adults-only all-inclusive on the Cancun hotel zone beachfront
Multiple restaurants including Japanese, international and Mexican venues
Butler service and a large on-site spa with hydrotherapy facilities

name: Hyatt Ziva Cancun
highlights: All-ages all-inclusive set on a private peninsula at Punta Cancun with beaches on three sides
17 restaurants, lounges and bars, including an adults-only French venue
KidZ Club and dedicated kids' dessert parlor; 24-hour in-suite dining included

name: Excellence Playa Mujeres
highlights: Adults-only (18+) all-inclusive; all meals, à la carte dining and drinks included
Adjacent Greg Norman-designed 18-hole championship golf course
11 on-site restaurants plus a full-service spa with hydrotherapy circuit

name: Secrets The Vine Cancun
highlights: Adults-only tower resort in the Cancun hotel zone with 497 rooms and suites, all Unlimited-Luxury inclusive
Seven restaurants, seven bars and sommelier-led wine tastings on a wine theme
Three pools and Secrets Spa by Pevonia with hydrotherapy

name: Moon Palace Cancun
highlights: Large beachfront all-inclusive south of the Cancun hotel zone; unlimited dining and premium drinks included
27-hole Jack Nicklaus Signature golf course on property (fee applies)
Kids and teens programs, multiple pools, nightclub and nightly entertainment

name: Grand Velas Riviera Maya
highlights: AAA Five Diamond all-inclusive set on roughly 206 acres of jungle, mangrove and beach
Five signature à la carte restaurants: Cocina de Autor, Frida, Piaf, Sen Lin and Lucca
Forbes Five-Star SE Spa with a seven-step water ceremony; kids' and teens' clubs

name: UNICO 20°87° Hotel Riviera Maya
highlights: Adults-only all-inclusive with 448 rooms and included Local Host service
Five restaurants using locally sourced ingredients; mixology and wine/art experiences included
Three outdoor pools and a full-service spa on a beachfront setting near Akumal

name: Hotel Xcaret México
destination: Riviera Maya / Playa del Carmen, Mexico
highlights: 'All-Fun Inclusive' rate covers food and drinks plus unlimited admission and transport to Grupo Xcaret parks (Xcaret, Xel-Há, Xplor, Xoximilco, Xenses, Xenotes)
Round-trip airport transportation included in the rate
Around 20 dining venues, on-site rivers and cenotes woven through the property

name: TRS Yucatan Hotel
highlights: Adults-only all-inclusive with 454 suites and 24-hour room service, inside the Grand Palladium Riviera resort complex
Six à la carte restaurants and six bars reserved for TRS guests, plus butler service
Three private pools including an infinity pool, and access to Zentropía Palladium Spa & Wellness

name: Secrets Maroma Beach Riviera Cancun
highlights: Adults-only (18+) Unlimited-Luxury resort on Maroma Beach with 412 suites, including swim-out suites
Seven restaurants with no-reservation à la carte dining and top-shelf spirits included
13,000 sq ft Secrets Spa with hydrotherapy circuit; included non-motorized watersports

name: Dreams Tulum Resort & Spa
highlights: Unlimited-Luxury all-inclusive on 44 acres of beach and jungle, about five minutes from downtown Tulum
16 restaurants and bars; gourmet room service included
Explorer's Club kids' program with an on-site water park (six slides) and a watersports center

name: Le Blanc Spa Resort Los Cabos
highlights: Adults-only (18+) all-inclusive with 369 suites; gratuities included in the rate
Seven restaurants including French (Lumière) and Italian (Bella) venues
Roughly 29,000 sq ft spa with hydrotherapy area, plus four pools

name: Hyatt Ziva Los Cabos
destination: Los Cabos (San José del Cabo), Mexico
highlights: All-ages all-inclusive on the Sea of Cortez with seven restaurants included
KidZ Club with supervised activities and a mini waterpark with five slides
Four pools and two hot tubs; ocean swimming off the resort beach is not permitted due to strong currents

name: Grand Velas Los Cabos
highlights: Forbes Five-Star all-inclusive; all suites, all dining and drinks included
Five gourmet restaurants including Cocina de Autor (18+ only) overseen by a two-Michelin-star chef
Three tiered infinity pools (top tiers all-ages, ocean-side tier adults-only) plus kids' club and splash area

name: Secrets Puerto Los Cabos Golf & Spa Resort
destination: Los Cabos (San José del Cabo), Mexico
highlights: Adults-only Unlimited-Luxury resort with 500 all-suite accommodations, including swim-out suites
Set beside the Puerto Los Cabos golf course with Jack Nicklaus and Greg Norman designed nines
Gourmet à la carte dining, top-shelf spirits and 24-hour room service included; on-site spa with hydrotherapy

name: Hard Rock Hotel Los Cabos
highlights: 639-room all-inclusive in the Diamante development with unlimited food, drinks and room service included
Eight restaurants, five pools with swim-up bars, water slides and a bowling alley in the Moonlight Lounge
Roxity Kids Club plus a Music Lab for guests 12 and over; ocean swimming not permitted due to currents

name: Grand Velas Riviera Nayarit
highlights: AAA Five Diamond all-inclusive on Banderas Bay with 267 suites starting around 1,000 sq ft
Four gourmet restaurants (Frida, Lucca, Piaf, Sen Lin) plus in-suite dining and stocked minibar included
Three-tiered infinity pool, Forbes Five-Star spa, kids' and teens' clubs

name: Hyatt Ziva Puerto Vallarta
highlights: All-ages all-inclusive on a private cove with 335 suites, some with swim-up access or plunge pools
10 restaurants, bars and lounges included, plus four pools with an adults-only pool
KidZ Club and a spa with hydrotherapy; under 30 minutes from Puerto Vallarta airport

name: Secrets Vallarta Bay Puerto Vallarta
highlights: Adults-only Unlimited-Luxury resort with 271 suites, including swim-out suites
Seven dining venues plus free-flow access to neighboring Dreams Vallarta Bay for adult guests
14,000 sq ft spa with hydrotherapy circuit; minutes from the Malecón boardwalk

name: Secrets Aura Cozumel
highlights: Adults-only (18+) all-inclusive with 168 suites, many with swim-up access
Eight dining venues including four à la carte restaurants and a wine cellar; meals, drinks, taxes and gratuities included
Three pools plus snorkeling directly from the beach and non-motorized watersports

name: Cozumel Palace
highlights: All-inclusive oceanfront property with 169 suites, walking distance to downtown San Miguel
Four on-site restaurants; food, beverages and gratuities included in the rate
On-site snorkeling and scuba access to Cozumel's reefs, plus the Awe Spa

name: Iberostar Waves Cozumel
highlights: All-inclusive bungalow-style resort on Cozumel's southwestern coast (recently rebranded from Iberostar Cozumel to Iberostar Waves Cozumel)
On-site Dressel Divers dive center with boats and direct access to the Mesoamerican reef
Five restaurants, Star Camp kids' program, kids' pool and an on-site theater with nightly shows
